title: helichrysum buddlejoides
intro: Helichrysum buddlejoides, also known as the yellow everlast, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Helichrysum genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Helichrysum buddlejoides include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for its medicinal uses, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
